channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Cricket SA restructures domestic competitions to strengthen Proteas pipeline
item.description: Cricket South Africa (CSA) has officially announced changes to its domestic cricket structure to enhance the quality of the Proteas and address long-standing financial pressures. Division One teams wi...

item.title: Peggie Castle: Iconic Actress and Hollywood Star of the 1950s
item.description: Peggie Castle (1927–1973) was a celebrated American actress known for her distinctive beauty, captivating voice, and compelling screen presence during the 1950s. Often cast in roles that highlighted h...

item.title: Traffic chaos persists in Karachi despite e-challan system
item.description: Karachi’s traffic situation remains problematic despite the introduction of the e-challan system in October 2025. While cameras and automated ticketing have been installed on major routes, commuters c...

item.title: Sony Introduces Sixth-Generation Wearable Thermo Device with Advanced Cooling and Heating Features
item.description: Sony Thermo Technology has unveiled the Reon Pocket 6, the latest iteration of its wearable thermo device designed to cool or heat the body surface when worn around the neck. The new lineup includes t...

item.title: Detective uncovers fabricated disability to hold child abuser accountable
item.description: Detective Constable Matt Gibson of Leicestershire Police played a crucial role in exposing the deceptive tactics of John Siddell and his brother James. In June 2021, John Siddell faced allegations of ...

item.title: U.S. Farmers Face Challenges Amid Rising Costs and Supply Disruptions
item.description: American farmers are facing severe challenges as a result of recent geopolitical and economic developments linked to U.S. policies. President Trump's authorization of military action against Iran has ...

item.title: How to Choose the Right Air Purifier for Your Home
item.description: Air purifiers have become increasingly important for Canadians, especially for those with asthma or allergic rhinitis, affecting 20 to 25 per cent of the population. Environmental triggers such as pol...

item.title: APC Aspirant Osifo Says He and Tinubu Go Cooperate Regardless of Primary Outcome
item.description: Stanley Osifo, wey dey contest for APC presidential ticket ahead of 2027 elections, don talk say President Bola Tinubu go work with am if e happen say e defeat am for party primary. Osifo yan this one...

item.title: Indian Illustrators and Journalist Receive Prestigious Eisner Award Nominations
item.description: Indian illustrators Charbak Dipta and Anand RK, along with journalist Suparna Sharma, have been nominated for the 2026 Eisner Awards, one of the most prestigious recognitions in the global comic book ...

item.title: Montreal Canadiens Have Chance to Reach Eastern Conference Final Against Buffalo Sabres
item.description: The Montreal Canadiens are set to compete in a crucial game against the Buffalo Sabres that could secure their spot in the Eastern Conference final. The Canadiens have shown strong performance through...

item.title: Cruise Industry Maintains Popularity Despite Recent Health Incidents
item.description: Despite recent news of hantavirus and norovirus outbreaks on cruise ships, the popularity of cruises remains robust. Three passengers aboard the MV Hondius tragically died from hantavirus following a ...

item.title: Boosting Mitochondrial Activity Restores Memory in Mouse Models of Dementia
item.description: Researchers from INSERM and the University of Bordeaux, in collaboration with the Université de Moncton, have demonstrated for the first time that mitochondrial dysfunction may directly contribute to ...

item.title: Delta Goodrem delivers standout performance at Eurovision in Vienna
item.description: Australian singer Delta Goodrem was among the frontrunners at the Eurovision Song Contest after delivering a remarkable performance in Vienna. Her performance captivated both the audience and the judg...

item.title: Partial Ngong Road Closure for Two Weeks, KURA Provides Alternative Routes for Motorists
item.description: Nairobi motorists should prepare for some late-night disruptions along Ngong Road and Naivasha Road near Junction Mall. The Kenya Urban Roads Authority (KURA) has announced that a section of these roa...

item.title: Canadian tourist diagnosed with hantavirus following cruise ship outbreak
item.description: A Canadian tourist has tested positive for hantavirus in British Columbia after disembarking the Dutch luxury cruise ship MV Hondius, which experienced an outbreak of the virus. The patient, from Yuko...

item.title: B.C. hospital monitors Canadian patient with Andes hantavirus after Antarctic cruise
item.description: British Columbia health officials have confirmed that one of four Canadians isolating after exposure to the Andes strain of hantavirus aboard an Antarctic cruise ship has tested positive. The affected...

item.title: Millicent Omanga Visits Her Mum’s Beautiful Home in Kisii County
item.description: Aspiring Nairobi County Woman Representative Millicent Omanga recently shared heartwarming moments with her mother during a visit to their rural home in Kiamokama, Chituka, Kisii County. The visit gav...

item.title: Bulgaria Wins Eurovision with Dara's 'Bangaranga' While UK Finishes Last
item.description: Bulgaria claimed its first ever Eurovision victory with Dara's high-energy anthem 'Bangaranga', securing 516 points and topping both the jury and public votes. The 27-year-old pop star impressed with ...

item.title: Karachi Beverage Fest Showcases Creative Summer Drinks by Students and Professionals
item.description: On Saturday, Karachi’s Wok Hei restaurant hosted an exciting beverage festival where both student chefs and professional mixologists presented an array of refreshing summer drinks. The event featured ...

item.title: Trump’s Comments on Iran Uranium Undermine U.S. Negotiation Position
item.description: During a recent interview on Fox News with Sean Hannity, President Donald Trump made statements regarding the U.S. approach to Iran's nuclear program that could weaken his negotiating leverage. Trump ...
